description: Next generation high bandwidth memory expected to increase memory bandwidth and capacity for AI accelerators.
Chip-on-wafer-on-substrate packaging used to integrate accelerators with HBM for high performance AI systems.
Thermal management approach increasingly used for high density AI racks where air cooling becomes insufficient.
NVIDIA high speed interconnect technology used to connect GPUs within AI servers and clusters.
Silicon carbide power devices that can improve power conversion efficiency in demanding electrical systems.
Gallium nitride power devices used for high efficiency and high frequency power conversion.
Power distribution architecture used in high density AI racks to deliver reliable power to accelerators and servers.
